negative_variants.description: Always Async Reset Counter: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Always Async Reset Counter: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Always Async Reset Counter: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Always Async Reset Counter: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
